name: 5-Wick Clear Glass Bergamot Knob-Lid Jar Candle 28oz - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Soy-Blend, Farmhouse Style
description:
Awaken your senses with the refreshing aroma of the 5-Wick Clear Glass Bergamot Knob-Lid Jar Candle from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This jar candle features a clear glass construction with the embossed name "Bergamot" and comes with a brass-finish metal lid to help you cover up the candle when not in use. Filled with soy, paraffin and palm wax, this scented jar candle burns for around 40 hours.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather ∙ Create ∙ Enjoy
